name: Tinker
description: Victory is 10% inspiration, 90% decapitation! Boush, the Tinker Boush the Tinker's diminutive race is known for its intelligence, its cunning, and its prickly relationship with magic. As a matter of pride, they survive by their wits, and use only those powers of nature that may be unlocked through rational methodologies.

abilities.name: Eureka!
abilities.description: Grants Tinker an item-based cooldown reduction per, with a cap.

abilities.name: Laser
abilities.description: Blinds and damages the unit-targeted enemy. Laser is now an area-targeted ability and applies all ability effects to enemy units centered around the primary enemy unit.

abilities.name: March of the Machines
abilities.description: applies a non-stacking heal over time while passing through allied heroes.

abilities.name: Defense Matrix
abilities.description: Applies an all damage barrier and grants bonus status resistance to the affected allied unit. When is active on Tinker, the barrier dispels Tinker and then relocates him to a random point within a certain distance upon the all damage barrier depletion.

abilities.name: Warp Flare
abilities.description: Fires a damaging flare towards an enemy unit and applies a debuff that reduces both the affected enemy unit's cast range and attack range. Launches the toward the primary after the, then the second projectile is launched immediately to the secondary target.

abilities.name: Keen Conveyance
abilities.description: Can teleport himself directly to an allied hero's current location.

abilities.name: Rearm
abilities.description: A new battery here, another set of rockets there, Boush continually improves on existing technology.
